content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against 09c1aa27b6d8a370582bac67976c99e644b9065e, excluding .ralph-burning runtime state. Found one correctness issue. Targeted force-complete tests, cargo fmt --check, and cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passed under nix develop; full nix build was not run.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:2305 passes the distinct reviewer-source count into handle_propose_new_bead for force-completed propose_new_bead deferrals. handle_propose_new_bead then enforces the parsimonious proposal threshold, default 2 at src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:34, and returns Pending below threshold at src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:5195. A force-completed accepted proposal from a single available reviewer will therefore not create the required follow-up bead even though the contract says propose_new_bead deferrals should become beads when the br adapter is present. Add a force-complete-specific path that guarantees creation for accepted propose_new_bead deferrals while preserving existing duplicate/existing-bead checks.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The current regression uses two sources, so it misses the default single-reviewer path that is common when optional reviewers are exhausted.
